investor_1.name: Portfolio HQ
investor_1.title: PORTFOLIO HQ
lesson: A portfolio holds many investments at once.
Spreading money across types lowers your risk.
Stay invested for years to let it grow.

investor_2.name: Research Core
investor_2.title: RESEARCH CORE
investor_2.hint: TILT to keep 🔬 steady in the safe zone
lesson: Learn about a company before you invest.
Good research helps you avoid bad bets.
Balance facts, not hype, when you choose.

investor_3.name: Dividend District
investor_3.title: DIVIDEND DISTRICT
lesson: Dividends pay you part of a company's profit.
Compounding turns small gains into big ones.

a: Money that comes in on its own

investor_4.name: Asset Realm
investor_4.title: ASSET REALM
investor_4.hint: FLIP two cards · find the matching pair
lesson: Assets are things that can grow in value.
Stocks and property can rise over time.
Owning many assets keeps you safer.

investor_5.name: Risk Control
investor_5.title: RISK CONTROL CENTER
investor_5.hint: AIM and tap the 📈 good buy · spare 🎰
lesson: Higher reward usually means higher risk.
Avoid risky bets that promise quick riches.
Spreading money out protects your savings.

investor_6.name: Investor Academy
investor_6.title: INVESTOR ACADEMY
lesson: Slow, steady investing beats chasing fads.
Hold good investments for the long run.
Don't put in money you can't afford to lose.
